output.summary: Swapped to 4096 vocab with uniform XSA layers, stronger WD+mlp4, coprime loader plus GPTQ/Brotli and sigmoid-gated UNet skips for a streamlined larger model.
techniques: Higher weight decay with wider MLPs and reduced LR to keep bigger weights compressible
Coprime-stride loader and GPTQ Hessian-aware quantization with byte-shuffle+ Brotli compression
Simplified architecture (no gated attention/value residuals) with sigmoid-gated UNet skips and XSA in all layers
